metadata.title: About Us | TP Georgia
metadata.description: TP Georgia — your trusted provider of unforgettable journeys and experiences in Georgia.

hero.title: Welcome to Georgia
hero.tagline: Real emotions • Outstanding places • Unforgettable memories

intro.subtitle: Your trusted provider of unforgettable journeys and experiences
intro.description: With more than 12 years of experience in tourism, we create journeys that show you Georgia as it truly is — authentic, impressive, and distinguished by its greatness.

localExperience.title: Local Experience
localExperience.description: We love Georgia and want to share that love with you. That is why we offer places and experiences you will rarely find in typical tourist programs. Discover Georgia through its beautiful nature, rich culture, centuries-old traditions, and heartfelt hospitality. Our goal is to show you not only famous landmarks, but also the places that often remain beyond standard tourist routes. Family maranis, local workshops, culinary master classes, mountain villages, centuries-old traditions, and authentic experiences give you the chance to see and personally feel real Georgian culture, everyday life, and the unique hospitality that makes Georgia a special country. We create journeys that help you get to know our country, its culture, and its people more deeply.

qualityService.title: Quality Service
qualityService.description: Comfortable transport, professional guides, reliable organization, and an individual approach to every guest.

tailoredTravel.title: Travel Tailored to You
tailoredTravel.description: Individual or group tours, family vacations, school excursions, corporate trips — we will help you create the best program for you.

metadata.title: Gallery | TP Georgia
metadata.description: Browse photos from our tours and excursions across Georgia — memorable moments and beautiful destinations.

aside.quote: Georgia is not just a destination — it is a feeling you carry home.
